rationale: AAVE generates $182M annualized revenue from real lending fees with 3.8% real yield APR and minimal token inflation. P/S of 15.2x trades 17% below peer median (MKR 18.4x, COMP 22.1x, SKY 9.7x), making valuation attractive for the largest DeFi lending protocol ($22.8B TVL). Growth is accelerating with Q1 2025 elevated activity and GHO stablecoin diversifying revenue ($12.7M contribution). Risks include event-driven revenue spikes tied to liquidations and the Kelp DAO hack exposing liquid restaking concentration risk ($6.6B TVL loss). Anti-GHO buyback program ($50M/yr) supports real yield durability.
